title: Master of Business Administration (MBA)
program_description: Official GU MBA evidence appears on the Academics page, Application page, Business Department page, MBA contract sheet, and Financial Policies page.
notes: The catalogue and contract sheet show a 39-credit MBA plan and separate thesis/project tracks. Tuition remains null in the inventory because the shared tuition data is not being duplicated at the program level. The thesis/project structure supports THESIS_OR_NON_THESIS.

title: Master of Education
program_description: Official GU Master of Education evidence appears on the Academics page, Application page, Education Department page, and Financial Policies page.
notes: The Education Department page explicitly names Master of Education as an advanced program. No program-specific credits or duration were recovered in the discovery report, so those fields remain null.

title: Master in Arabic Language and Literature
official_degree_name: Master in Arabic Language and Literature
program_description: Official GU Master in Arabic Language and Literature evidence appears on the Academics page, Application page, Arabic Language Department page, and Financial Policies page.
notes: The Arabic Language Department page states the master's program is two years and 30 credits, including 7 thesis credits. No dedicated admissions or language admission rule was recovered, so unsupported fields remain null.

title: Master in Islamic Studies
program_description: Official GU catalogue evidence lists Master's in Islamic Studies tracks, and the accreditation page confirms the master's-level Islamic Studies naming context.
notes: The catalogue lists Islamic Studies as a master's area with multiple tracks. No dedicated program page was recovered, so the official program URL remains null and the tracks are preserved as a single degree record.
